mapper.sql: id, scanId, userId, vid, leftLeg, rightLeg, leftShoulder, rightShoulder, cavumConchae, hipJoint, shoulderMidpoint, acromionReference, results, createTime
mapper.insert: insert into body_status (id, scanId, userId, vid, leftLeg, rightLeg, leftShoulder, rightShoulder, cavumConchae, hipJoint, shoulderMidpoint, acromionReference, results, createTime) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{scanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{vid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{leftLeg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rightLeg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{leftShoulder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rightShoulder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cavumConchae,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{hipJoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shoulderMidpoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acromionReference,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{results,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

insert into body_status
id,
scanId,
userId,
vid,
leftLeg,
rightLeg,
leftShoulder,
rightShoulder,
cavumConchae,
hipJoint,
shoulderMidpoint,
acromionReference,
results,
createTime,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{scanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{vid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{leftLeg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{rightLeg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{leftShoulder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{rightShoulder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cavumConchae,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{hipJoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{shoulderMidpoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{acromionReference,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{results,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
mapper.update:
update body_status
scanId = #{scanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT},
vid = #{vid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
leftLeg = #{leftLeg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rightLeg = #{rightLeg,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
leftShoulder = #{leftShoulder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
rightShoulder = #{rightShoulder,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cavumConchae = #{cavumConchae,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
hipJoint = #{hipJoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shoulderMidpoint = #{shoulderMidpoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
acromionReference = #{acromionReference,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
results = #{results,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update body_status set scanId = #{scanId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, userId = #{userId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, vid = #{vid,jdbcType=BIGINT}, leftLeg = #{leftLeg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rightLeg = #{rightLeg,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, leftShoulder = #{leftShoulder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, rightShoulder = #{rightShoulder,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cavumConchae = #{cavumConchae,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, hipJoint = #{hipJoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shoulderMidpoint = #{shoulderMidpoint,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, acromionReference = #{acromionReference,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, results = #{results,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, createTime = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select:
SELECT weight,percentBodyFat,bmi,kcal,waistToHip,fluid,muscle,createTime FROM bodys_info
userId = #{paramMap.userId}
and DATE_FORMAT(createTime, '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{paramMap.startTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
and DATE_FORMAT(createTime, '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{paramMap.endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')
SELECT *FROM body_status WHERE userId = #{userId} ORDER BY createTime DESC LIMIT 0 ,1
